page_metadata.biotools__summary: DRAGoM (Detection of RNA using Assembly Graph from Metagenomics data) is a tool for metagenomic noncoding RNA profiling and biomarker discovery. DRAGoM is a tool designed to predict and assemble ncRNA from next generation sequencing data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DRAGoM (Detection of RNA using Assembly Graph from Metagenomics data) is a tool for metagenomic noncoding RNA profiling and biomarker discovery. DRAGoM is a tool designed to predict and assemble ncRNA from next generation sequencing data.
